headline: Time Travel Agency Offers 'Regret Tours' to Fix Past Embarrassing Moments
summary: Limited slots available for your high school prom.
fullBody: Temporal Fixers Inc. launched regret tourism packages. Customers can revisit awkward moments with modern knowledge. 'I finally told my boss what I really thought in 2017,' said one satisfied customer. Side effects include existential whiplash and multiple versions of yourself showing up at family dinners.
